html:
Exclusive to:

The Flying Pig Arcane Shop is a naturally spawning Pig Shop Structure exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found in the Palace Pig City and sells a variety of Magic items to the player.

If the player obtains the Key to the City, The Flying Pig Arcane Shop also becomes craftable in the City Planning Tab using four Boards, one Nightmare Fuel and four Pig Skins.

Contents

  • 1 Interior
  • 2 Decor
    • 2.1 Shelfs
    • 2.2 Pillar
    • 2.3 Lamps
    • 2.4 Windows
    • 2.5 Doors
  • 3 Gallery

Interior

Upon entering The Flying Pig Arcane Shop, the player will find a variety of Items that are sold in exchange for Oincs. An Erudite Pig works at the desk.

The following items can be found on displays in the center of the shop which will be restocked by the shopkeeper:

Item Name
Chilled Amulet 30
Dark Sword 50
Fire Staff 30
Ice Staff 30
Life Giving Amulet 50
Nightmare Amulet 50
One-man Band 40
Belt of Hunger 20
Night Armor 20
Living Log 5

Additionally, the following items can be bought from shelves which will not be restocked by the shopkeeper:

Item Name Amount
Fake Kazoo 1 1
Gord's Knot 1 1
Melty Marbles 1 1

Decor

  • Windchime
  • Scream Catcher
  • Beefalo Mounting
  • Bookcase Mint
  • Containers

Shelfs

  • Hutch Shelf

Pillar

  • Square Wall Front
  • Square Wall Corner

Lamps

  • Basic Lantern Sidewall
  • Basic Lantern Backwall

Windows

Doors

  • Exit

Gallery

  • The interior of The Flying Pig Arcane Shop.
  • Urn Decor
  • Snakebasket Decor
  • Vase Decor
StructuresCraftable Items

“This could put a twinkle in my eye.”
–Wilson
“Are there books about magical fires in there?”
–Willow
“Is place for magics things.”
–Wolfgang
“Can any of this magic bring back Abigail?”
–Wendy
“CONTAINS SOFTWARE UPGRADES”
–WX-78
“A shop for items of esoteric nature.”
–Wickerbottom
“All that magic stuff seems a little loonie.”
–Woodie
“Ahh... more my style.”
–Maxwell
“This looks like a shop I could spend some time in!”
–Wagstaff
“A shöp öf the mystic arts!”
–Wigfrid
“Cool! It's a magic shop!”
–Webber
“Magic always makes things easier.”
–Walani
“It's full of magic things.”
–Warly
“Thar be magic in that there store.”
–Woodlegs
“TOIL AND TROUBLES”
–Wilba
“Magics place”
–Wormwood
“A magic shop with actual magic in it.”
–Wheeler

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Cửa Hàng Bí Ẩn Lợn Bay là một Cấu Trúc Cửa Hàng Lợn sinh sản tự nhiên dành riêng cho Hamlet DLC. Nó được tìm thấy ở Thành phố Lợn Cung điện và bán nhiều loại vật phẩm Phép thuật cho người chơi.

'''The Flying Pig Arcane Shop''' is a naturally spawning [[Pig Shops|Pig Shop]] [[Structures|Structure]] exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. It is found in the [[Pig City|Palace Pig City]] and sells a variety of [[Magic]] items to the player.

If the player obtains the [[Key to the City]], The Flying Pig Arcane Shop also becomes craftable in the [[City Planning Tab]] using four [[Boards]], one [[Nightmare Fuel]] and four [[Pig Skin]]s.

==[[File:Door (Ancient Pig Ruins Exit) Map Icon.png|32px]] Interior==
Upon entering The Flying Pig Arcane Shop, the player will find a variety of [[Items]] that are sold in exchange for [[Oinc]]s. An [[Erudite Pig]] works at the desk.

The following items can be found on displays in the center of the shop which will be restocked by the shopkeeper:
